settings.title: Ecological Consultation
settings.text: We offer tailored ecological consulting services for homeowners, landowners, and organisations looking to restore, design, and manage native habitats across the Pacific Northwest.

settings.heading: Site Assessment
settings.text: On-site consultation and observation-based evaluation of your land’s ecology, existing vegetation, soil, and hydrology.

settings.heading: Habitat Design
settings.text: Custom native plant design plans tailored to your site conditions, goals, and budget — from rain gardens to full habitat restorations.

settings.heading: Ongoing Guidance
settings.text: Long-term project oversight, seasonal management recommendations, and adaptive guidance as your landscape evolves.

settings.heading: We Begin with Listening
settings.text: Every landscape is different. We start with a conversation about your goals, then visit your site to understand its unique ecology before recommending any course of action. Our approach is observational, collaborative, and rooted in the local ecosystem.

settings.heading: What does a consultation include?
settings.content: An initial consultation includes an on-site visit, a written summary of observations, and recommendations for native planting, habitat improvement, or landscape design depending on your goals.

settings.heading: How long does a consultation take?
settings.content: Site visits typically take 1–2 hours depending on property size. A written summary is usually delivered within one week of the visit.

settings.heading: Do you work outside Portland?
settings.content: Our primary service area is the Portland metro region and surrounding Willamette Valley, but we do take on select projects throughout the Pacific Northwest. Contact us to discuss your location.

settings.title: Book a Consultation
settings.text: Reach out to schedule a site visit or ask us anything about your project. We typically respond within two business days.
